topics.audience: AI 从业者 / 技术决策者

topics.sourceDesc: GitHub Trending / Show HN / 开发者博客
topics.title: Thibault Sottiaux: ChatGPT Whether you understand the name or not. It's here to stay. It's the past, the present, the fu
topics.audience: 企业老板 / 产品负责人 / 开发者
topics.core: ChatGPT Whether you understand the name or not. It's here to stay. It's the past, the present, the future. Synonym with AI, soon synonym with agents. Much to build.
topics.relevance: 来自一线 AI builder 的公开观点，适合判断开发者采用、产品体验和企业焦虑。

angles.title: Thibault Sottiaux 背后的开发者真实需求
angles.note: 切口：不写工具测评，写开发者为什么愿意换流程、接插件、改团队协作方式。

angles.title: 从演示走向日常工作，差的是哪一步
angles.note: 切口：拆一个真实任务链：需求进入、代码生成、测试、审阅、上线。

angles.title: 企业读者该看哪些采用信号
angles.note: 切口：看文档更新频率、GitHub issue、客户引用、招聘岗位和生态插件。

topics.sourceDesc: GitHub Trending / Show HN / 开发者博客
topics.title: Thariq: Workflows are the biggest upgrade to Claude Code’s capabilities since skills and subagents. I dove deep into it
topics.audience: 企业老板 / 产品负责人 / 开发者
topics.core: Workflows are the biggest upgrade to Claude Code’s capabilities since skills and subagents. I dove deep into it with @sidbid to figure out best practices, examples and more. I’m particularly excited about the non-technical tasks it enables

topics.title: Amjad Masad: Excited to partner with @Microsoft to enable everyone in the enterprise to build and deploy safe & secure F
topics.audience: 企业老板 / 产品负责人 / 开发者

topics.sourceDesc: GitHub Trending / Show HN / 开发者博客
topics.title: Guillermo Rauch: YES-CODE An entire category of software, "no-code", was built under the presumption that code is expens
topics.audience: 企业老板 / 产品负责人 / 开发者
topics.core: YES-CODE An entire category of software, "no-code", was built under the presumption that code is expensive, difficult, and scarce. Coding agents have forever changed the equation. Code is now cheap, easy, and abundant. I remember @cramforce
topics.relevance: 来自一线 AI builder 的公开观点，适合判断开发者采用、产品体验和企业焦虑。

topics.relevance: 高互动 Builder 观点，适合改写成企业能理解的商业冲突和判断题。

angles.title: Josh Woodward 为什么会刺中企业焦虑
angles.note: 切口：找一个明确情绪钩子，比如岗位替代、预算失控、客户流失、安全责任。

angles.title: 把热闹改写成一个商业冲突
angles.note: 切口：标题必须回答谁的利益被改变，比如供应商拿走预算、员工失去入口、平台获得控制权。

angles.title: 爆款改编前必须补哪条事实
angles.note: 切口：先补一条可验证来源，再写观点。当前可用证据边界：Follow Builders · @joshwoodward · 272 engagement
